name: Humans
comment:
<https://humanstxt.org/>

Humans.txt is an initiative for knowing the people behind the website. It's a text file from humans, for humans.

@docs Section, Humans, humans

aliases.name: Humans
aliases.comment: The humans type is composed by a list of sections

aliases.name: Section
aliases.comment: Each section of the humans.txt file can be defined by a headline and a list of strings that create the content

values.name: humans

name: Robots
comment:
<https://moz.com/learn/seo/robotstxt>

Include a Robots.txt file to instruct robots (search engines) how and what pages to crawl in your website.

@docs Value, Policy, Robots, policy, robots, withCrawlDelay, CleanParam, withCleanParam

unions.name: Value
unions.comment: The value type used for most entries of robots

aliases.name: Policy
aliases.type: { userAgent : Robots.Value, allow : Maybe.Maybe Robots.Value, disallow : Maybe.Maybe Robots.Value }

aliases.name: Robots
aliases.type: { policies : List.List (Robots.PolicyExtra Robots.Policy), host : String.String, sitemap : Robots.Value }

values.name: policy
values.comment:
Create a robots.txt policy entry

    policy
        { userAgent = SingleValue "*"
        , allow = Just (SingleValue "*")
        , disallow = Nothing
        }

values.name: robots
values.comment:
Creates a String with the robots.txt output

    robots
        { sitemap = SingleValue "/sitemap.xml"
        , host = "https://marcodaniels.com"
        , policies =
            [ policy
                { userAgent = SingleValue "*"
                , allow = Just (SingleValue "*")
                , disallow = Nothing
                }
            ]
        }

values.name: withCleanParam
values.comment:
Add [clean param](https://yandex.com/support/webmaster/robot-workings/clean-param.html) property to the [`policy`](#policy) entry

    policy
        { userAgent = SingleValue "*"
        , allow = Just (SingleValue "*")
        , disallow = Nothing
        }
        |> withCleanParam [ { param = "id", path = "/user" } ]
values.type: List.List Robots.CleanParam -> Robots.PolicyExtra Robots.Policy -> Robots.PolicyExtra Robots.Policy

values.name: withCrawlDelay
values.comment:
Add [crawl-delay](https://moz.com/learn/seo/robotstxt) property to the [`policy`](#policy) entry

    policy
        { userAgent = SingleValue "*"
        , allow = Just (SingleValue "*")
        , disallow = Nothing
        }
        |> withCrawlDelay 10
